body: Meera, JIDA Oct 2026 just dropped. Relevant to your high_risk_adults — 2100-participant study: 3-month fluoride varnish recall outperforms 6-month for high-risk adult caries. 2-min read. Want me to pull the abstract + draft a patient-ed WhatsApp you can share? — JIDA Oct 2026, p.14
rationale: Research digest with source citation and patient cohort anchor; curiosity + reciprocity levers.

body: Meera, Dental Council of India circular 2026-11-04 se important update: DCI revised radiograph dose limits effective 2026-12-15. Deadline: 2026-12-15. Non-compliance par licence review ho sakti hai. Main ek quick compliance checklist draft kar sakti hoon — 5 min ka kaam hai. Reply YES?
rationale: Regulation change with specific deadline and penalty framing; loss aversion; effort externalization.

body: Hi Priya, Dr. Meera's Dental Clinic ki taraf se 🦷 5 mahine ho gaye aapki aakhri visit ke baad — 6-month recall due hai. 2 slots available: Wed 5 Nov, 6pm ya Thu 6 Nov, 5pm. Dental Cleaning @ ₹299 + complimentary fluoride. Reply 1 for Wed 5 Nov, 2 for Thu 6 Nov, ya apna preferred time batayein.
rationale: Customer recall with real slots, price, and language-matched greeting; specific date/time anchors.

body: Bharat, ek quick check: aapke calls is week 50% drop hue hain (avg 12 se 4 pe aa gaye). Views stable hain — yeh conversion gap hai, visibility nahi. Main profile audit karke top 2-3 fixes identify kar sakti hoon. Reply YES?
rationale: Perf dip with exact numbers; diagnoses root cause to avoid alarm; effort externalization.

body: Bharat, subscription 12 din mein renew hoti hai. Is period mein haasil: 980 views, 4 calls, 2 leads. Renew karke yeh momentum jaari rakhein. ₹4999 — Reply YES to renew, STOP to pause.
rationale: Renewal anchored on real value delivered; loss framing without alarm; clean YES/STOP.

body: Lakshmi, Diwali sirf 188 din door hai. 3 salons in Hyderabad ran this last Diwali and saw 2.3× footfall. Main aapke liye 'Diwali Glow Package — threading + facial + nail art @ ₹999' draft kar sakti hoon + WhatsApp blast schedule kar sakti hoon aaj raat tak. Reply YES?
rationale: Festival with countdown, social proof from peer salons, specific combo offer, effort externalization.

body: Hi Kavya 💍 Lakshmi from Studio11 Family Salon here. 196 days to your wedding — perfect window to lock in your bridal skin-prep program before 2026-11 slots fill up. ₹2,499 covers 4 sessions + take-home kit. Shall I block your preferred Saturday 4pm for the first session next week?
rationale: Bridal follow-up with days-to-wedding count; preference honored; specific price and program; warm emoji.

body: Quick question — Lakshmi, is mahine kaun sa service sabse zyada demand mein hai aapke salon mein? Bridal prep ho raha hai ya regular grooming zyada?
rationale: Curiosity re-engagement via genuine business question; no pitch; Hindi-English mix; opens conversation.

body: Anjali, 38 din ho gaye. Is time mein 24 customers aaye honge jo aapko online nahi dhundh pa rahe. Win-back campaigns mein usually 20-25% lapsed customers wapas aate hain. Main 3 targeted messages draft kar sakti hoon — abhi? Reply YES?
rationale: Win-back with specific dormancy period, lapsed customer count, and peer benchmark; effort externalization.

body: Suresh — DC vs MI tonight, 19:30! Match evenings bring 30-40% more orders than your regular weeknight average. Match-day combo: Loaded Pizza + Garlic Bread + 2 Cokes @ ₹499. I can push it live on your listing right now + schedule a WhatsApp story. Reply YES?
rationale: IPL with match name and time; historical uplift data; specific combo at price; effort externalization to act now.

body: Suresh, is mahine 4 reviews mein 'delivery late' mention hua hai. Common quote: "took 50 mins for a 15 min ride". Ek small fix — proactive customer message jab delay ho — usually 60-70% complaints rok deta hai. Chahte ho main ek response template draft karun? Reply YES?
rationale: Review theme framed as insight with specific count and quote; specific fix with benchmark; effort externalization.

body: Suresh 🎉 aap 145 review count ke kareebi aa gaye! Yeh top 5% hai aapke category mein. 3 cheezein jo merchants is milestone ke baad karte hain: (1) shareable 'Thank You' post, (2) milestone combo offer, (3) Google visibility boost. Teeno draft kar dun? Reply YES?
rationale: Milestone with ranking context; 3-action plan with social proof + algorithmic angle; effort externalization.

body: Suresh, aapne 'corporate bulk thali package' discuss kiya tha. Main ek draft le aaya hoon: 'Corporate Lunch Thali @ ₹180 (min 20 pax, delivery 12-2pm, Koramangala-Indiranagar zone) — pricing, coverage, and min order included'. Sirf YES bolo aur main ise live kar deta hoon + ek outreach template bhi bhejta hoon.
rationale: Active planning with effort externalization (draft already ready); specific structure; forward momentum.

body: Karthik, views is week 30% down — yeh post resolution window apr jun mein expected hai. Jo gyms is season mein campaign chalate hain unhe 15-20% better retention milta hai. 'Summer Challenge' campaign — main structure ready kar sakti hoon. Reply YES?
rationale: Seasonal dip with exact delta; normalizes the drop; peer benchmark for counter-action; effort externalization.

body: Hi Rashmi! PowerHouse Fitness here 💪 It's been a while — 57 days since your last session. We've added new programs since you left — great fit for weight loss. Comeback offer: 3 FREE Trial Classes. No pressure — want to know more?
rationale: Lapsed customer win-back; warm tone; references their previous focus; specific offer; no pressure.

body: Padma, aapne 'kids yoga summer camp' discuss kiya tha. Main ek draft le aaya hoon: '30-day Kids Mindfulness Camp @ ₹3,500 (age 6-14, Jun 1–Jun 30, 9-10am) — 24 sessions + take-home mindfulness workbook'. Sirf YES bolo aur main ise live kar deta hoon + ek outreach template bhi bhejta hoon.
rationale: Active planning with effort externalization (draft already ready); specific structure; forward momentum.

body: Hi Karthik (parent: Sumitra)! Zen Yoga Studio here 🧘 Hope you enjoyed your trial session! If it felt right, your next step: First Month @ ₹499 — first regular session Sat 3 May, 8am — no commitment needed. How was the experience for you?
rationale: Trial follow-up asking genuine question; specific next slot + offer; no pressure.

body: Ramesh, atorvastatin supply alert: MfrZ ke batches AT2024-1102, AT2024-1108 2-week shortage mein hain. Chronic patients ke liye equivalent alternatives list karun + ek pharmacist note draft karun? Reply YES?
rationale: Supply alert with specific molecule, batch numbers, manufacturer; concrete action offered; pharmacies: calm/reliable tone.

body: Namaste! Apollo Health Plus Pharmacy se. Mr. Sharma ji, aapka metformin + atorvastatin + telmisartan refill 2026-04-28 khatam ho raha hai. 3 options: (1) store pe aayein, (2) ghar deliver karwa lein (same-day), (3) main doctor se repeat prescription coordinate karun. Kaun sa best rahega?
rationale: Chronic refill with specific medications and 3 clear options; home delivery reduces friction; warm Hindi tone.

body: Ramesh, seasonal demand shift: ORS demand ↑40 is week. Pharmacy data dikhata hai ORS + sunscreen + antifungal fast-moving hain. 'Summer Essentials Kit' bundle (₹299: ORS×5 + sunscreen + eye drops) ek simple high-margin move hai. Main listing pe description draft kar dun? Reply YES?
rationale: Seasonal trend with specific products and demand data; specific bundle at price; effort externalization.

body: Vikas, aapka Google Business Profile abhi unverified hai — matlab 'pharmacies & medical stores near me' searches mein aap show nahi ho rahe. Verification ke baad 30% views uplift typical hai. Sirf 5 minute — main step-by-step guide kar sakti hoon. Reply YES?
rationale: GBP unverified with specific uplift percentage and local search framing; loss aversion; 5-min effort minimization.

body: Meera, upcoming CDE: 'IDA Delhi: Digital impressions — 2026 state of the art'. 2 CE credits, free_for_members. Relevant to your case mix. Want me to send the registration link + block it in your calendar? Reply YES?
rationale: CDE with credits, fee, relevance to case mix; effort externalization (register + calendar block); peer/clinical tone.

body: Meera, 'Smile Studio' 1.3km door open hua hai — unka offer: Dental Cleaning @ ₹199. Aapki rating unse better hai — lekin CTR 0.9% peer se neeche hai. Best defensive move: 3 fresh Google posts + offer refresh is week. Main dono draft kar dun? Reply YES?
rationale: Competitor opened with specific distance and offer; highlights merchant's advantage first; specific CTR gap; defensive action.

body: Padma, 🎯 aapke calls is week 15% upar hain — likely driver: kids yoga post. Yeh momentum 48-72 ghante rehta hai. Main abhi ek campaign draft kar sakti hoon jab traffic peak pe hai. Reply YES?
rationale: Perf spike with exact delta and time-window urgency; effort externalization.

body: Anjali, 38 din ho gaye bina kisi baat ke. Ek genuine sawaal: is season mein aapke yahan kaunsa service/product sabse zyada chal raha hai? Main wahan se aage suggest karungi.
rationale: Dormancy re-engagement via curiosity question; no pitch; reciprocity framing.
